caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses is speaking into a microphone. He wears a grey patterned button-down shirt accented by a colorful blue and green band across the chest and a beaded necklace with a feather pendant. He stands in front of a backdrop of light brown horizontal slats, with a black microphone stand positioned in front of him. The text "ORCA" is visible in white letters on the right side of the frame. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar position, looking slightly downward with a gentle smile on his face. His facial expression and posture shift only slightly between the frames, suggesting he is in the middle of a speech or presentation. There are no other people clearly visible in the scene.
